ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snapshot_configuration_templates" (
  "template_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the template */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the snapshot configuration document template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "form_location" TEXT /* Location of the form within the system */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Any additional data related to the template */,
  "template_category" TEXT /* Category of the template */,
  "template_version" INTEGER /* Version of the template */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snapshot_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the configuration */,
  "template_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated template */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the snapshot configuration */,
  "associated_template" TEXT /* ID of the associated snapshot document template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the snapshot configuration */,
  "configuration_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snapshot_configurations_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES snapshot_configuration_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_templates" (
  "document_template_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the document template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the snapshot document template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document template */,
  "related_configuration" TEXT /* Reference to the associated configuration */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the document template */,
  "template_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document template in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_templates_related_configuration FOREIGN KEY ("related_configuration") REFERENCES snapshot_configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "configuration_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES snapshot_configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "configuration_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "changed_fields" TEXT /* Fields that were changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES snapshot_configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
